title: Boot all Zephyr test firmwares
description: Run every lichen/tests Zephyr testcase as firmware on at least one declared runtime platform using Twister, with additional declared platforms exercised where they provide distinct native_sim 64-bit or qemu_x86 execution. Record each scenario result; do not count compilation as boot.
acceptance_criteria: 1. All 37 test roots and all 62 scenarios are selected. 2. Each scenario reaches its ztest/console runtime oracle on at least one allowed platform. 3. Platform-specific scenarios run on their required platform. 4. Every failure/error/timeout gets a linked remediation Bead with logs. 5. Twister provenance is verified from a clean EBS worktree.
notes:
RESULT: 37/37 roots and 62/62 scenarios selected at source base 8e02a7ae924a226c91c23d8d19f0f5350c248364 plus scoped uncommitted fixes. Runtime classification: 35 WIN roots / 60 passing scenarios; 2 BLOCKED roots/scenarios: app_identity -> project-LICHEN-b9od, ping_l2 -> project-LICHEN-35qo. Baseline commands used west twister -T <workspace>/lichen/tests with ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=<workspace>/lichen on native_sim/native/64 and qemu_x86; targeted reruns used -s for corrected scenarios. ARM evidence root: /mnt/lichen-zephyr/validation/project-LICHEN-m5m1. Baseline Native64 39 configs and QEMU 30 configs passed verify-twister. Report hashes / ELF-count / aggregate hash: native64-run2 9f87b84ffbde3f0c7df137238461c5dfc7e1b4579ad283f93442926558efba5 / 41 / ccd1599ade1e6683a7cade8e7a7e38c2013d418eec116445660902e443f4f51c; qemu-x86-run3 153e1041451d76e7f17af17141f928e677ceb3f8f5078cf0077fef57bc81b55e / 30 / d8fc741e0aef1dbbc1952f74878409b1764d8cef01ee1917d36a29c67c19a490; fixes-native64-run4 cbc4f71de509100fa08eed08711e264fdd85fbe649e6537dccaf2497bf321ae7 / 5 / f99d18232ea7ca39a0146e0b6e53d9872d9920add0e8964da3efd7be904766a7; fixes2-native64-run5 14568ee4b03b09981805331ae8913f51eedc3ca953fe4e8ccdb44b471c847056 / 5 / aabda84a8113c8292280308d96a7172384696c2c77209d5e7d81417e51b44d2f; coap-native64-run6 8903bcb43b7eb9e522d4a2943c148c9bc5ee88003370302a22c1f07e194bdd49 / 1 / aef311f4f550a06b0ea08a35effd4e47ce801e2923da3263f6ffbcf25f6288ad; fixes-qemu-run7 2049d1578ddd136e41512a0bba9dbd6012fa6596ec3e232f15e212168a2fa749 / 2 / 7be799fe1272ba4966f0d6fe0a2313f33934bb91c58e43a9a6d06c978fcd20ef; meshtastic-ble-run8 dc815245d957c796ca0c3fa34aa79582eabce47478f67b3ddc2b3c8371f25101 / 1 / 27f4137f2bf5a6ff7943d1f061b3b16ecbae01d026949b060faf6a43910c8930. Independent x86_64 host report /home/ec2-user/zephyr-work/project-LICHEN/twister-out-x86-native64-host: 4dae2fb3c332c0dc62a4f1100ed2a6326fb49f63d12fd456b256b956ec4348d7 / 3 / e08d061ebff9218c24fe1cc07e07bcae42cc7d5962311eeb9ab646e7881f34df; reproduces both canary fatals and passes ICMPv6. Six discovered build/runtime defects fixed and closed: rtca, j0vl, gy5f, 4chk, 70z3, 3kov. Three-pass review rounds completed; separate security findings kppd, 1qio, cysk remain open.
INDEPENDENT EBS RECOVERY 2026-07-16: all seven cited Twister reports remain at /mnt/lichen-zephyr/validation/project-LICHEN-m5m1 and match recorded hashes: run2 9f87b84ffbde3f0c7df137238461c5dfc7e1b4579ad283f93442926558efba5d; run3 153e1041451d76e7f17af17141f928e677ceb3f8f5078cf0077fef57bc81b55e; run4 cbc4f71de509100fa08eed08711e264fdd85fbe649e6537dccaf2497bf321ae7; run5 14568ee4b03b09981805331ae8913f51eedc3ca953fe4e8ccdb44b471c847056; run6 8903bcb43b7eb9e522d4a2943c148c9bc5ee88003370302a22c1f07e194bdd49; run7 2049d1578ddd136e41512a0bba9dbd6012fa6596ec3e232f15e212168a2fa749; run8 dc815245d957c796ca0c3fa34aa79582eabce47478f67b3ddc2b3c8371f25101. Remediation progression confirms passing suites for power providers, SLIP, meshtastic gateway, BLE IPSP, CoAP client, and meshtastic BLE; final classification remains 60 passing scenarios and app_identity/ping_l2 BLOCKED.
FINAL TAXONOMY ERRATUM: app_identity and ping_l2 were executed on valid ARM64 and x86_64 Native64 backends and reproducibly crashed with Zephyr idle-thread stack-canary fatals. They are FAIL, not BLOCKED. Authoritative test result: 37 roots/62 scenarios = 35 WIN roots and 60 passing scenarios, 2 FAIL roots/scenarios (app_identity -> b9od; ping_l2 -> 35qo), 0 BLOCKED test roots/scenarios. Their remediation bugs remain open.
close_reason: Corrected test taxonomy: 60 scenarios WIN; app_identity and ping_l2 are reproducible FAILs on valid Native64 backends; no test scenario is BLOCKED.
